title: Knowledge-augmented Agentic AI for Mental Health Medication Information Seeking
summary: 知识图谱多代理系统整合社媒与监管数据，提供可溯源的抗抑郁药信息
highlights: LLM实体识别F1达0.969(药物)和0.973(病症)
患者社区数据与FDA报告重叠度低(Jaccard≤0.905)
知识图谱保留来源，确保每项声明可追溯和审计
score_reason: 多代理LLM结合知识图谱解决精神健康用药安全，高度相关
author: Huizi Yu, Jian Liu, Wenkong Wang, Lingyao Li, Jiayan Zhou, Zhaoqian Xue, Xiang Li, Xinxin Lin, Zhiying Liang, Zhuoru Wu, Siyuan Ma, Xin Ma, Lizhou Fan
